title: Ullathai Allitha
subTitle: Tired of his father's disciplinarian ways and to avoid marrying a girl chosen by the latter, Raja runs away to Ooty. There, he is hired as a driver by the man whose daughter he was supposed to marry.

title: Ullathai Allitha
subTitle: Tired of his father's disciplinarian ways and to avoid marrying a girl chosen by the latter, Raja runs away to Ooty. There, he is hired as a driver by the man whose daughter he was supposed to marry.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Nilave Vaa
subTitle: Nilave Vaa

title: Vasanthakala Paravai
subTitle: Ravi, a shopkeeper, falls in love with Uma, a student, who belongs to a rich family. But their relationship is tested when Uma's brother decides to intervene and break their bond.

title: April Maadhathil
subTitle: Kathir, a poor young man, and Shweta, a rich young girl, meet in college and fall in love. However, they are unable to confess their feelings to each other.

title: Vaazhkai Chakkaram
subTitle: Inspector Thangavelu convinces his father to reject the dowry system to marry Kalyani. However, a sudden misunderstanding leads their plans and the marriage in an entirely unexpected direction.

title: Alaigal Oivathillai
subTitle: Love blossoms between two individuals, but their differing religious beliefs create various obstacles in their relationship.

title: Anandha Ragam
subTitle: A fisherman arranges his sister's marriage to a wealthy man, against her wishes. He later discovers the groom is very sick, but his realisation comes too late to undo the fateful decision.

title: Muthu
subTitle: Muthu serves as a loyal servant to Raja Malayasimman, a rich landlord. However, things between them turn sour when they both fall in love with the same woman.

title: Muthu
subTitle: Muthu serves as a loyal servant to Raja Malayasimman, a rich landlord. However, things between them turn sour when they both fall in love with the same woman.

title: Suyamvaram
subTitle: Kuselan, a wealthy man with nine children, wishes to see them all married before he passes away. As a result, he offers a large dowry and organises detailed interviews with the chosen suitors.

title: Anna Nagar Mudhal Theru
subTitle: Sivaraman, a desperate unemployed youth, disguises himself as a Gorkha and takes up the job of a watchman. However, he is surprised when his childhood sweetheart moves into the colony he works in.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: En Bommukutti Ammavukku
subTitle: Vinod and Lakshmi, who lost their daughter in an accident, adopt Tinu, a vivacious young girl, from an orphanage. However, the family faces challenges when Tinu's birth parents set out to find her.

title: Udhaya
subTitle: Udhaya falls in love with Vasanthi, but realises that she is already engaged. Later, when he is wrongly framed for a crime, she strives to prove his innocence.

title: Chokka Thangam
subTitle: After Muthu gets his sister married, he is caught in a fix when the groom's parents force him to marry their daughter. However, Muthu is in love with another woman, Pavazham.

title: Thooral Ninnu Pochu
subTitle: Two families arrange the marriage of their son and daughter, who fall in love. However, tensions arise when the families clash over dowry demands, leading to the cancellation of the wedding.

title: Five Star
subTitle: Five college friends promise to stay together even after completing their education. However, one of them hides from the others that he has been forced to marry a village girl.

title: Dharma Durai
subTitle: An idealist sacrifices everything to educate his wayward brothers. However, he decides to teach them a lesson after his brothers misuse his sacrifices to enter the world of crime.

title: Duet
subTitle: Two musician brothers, Guna and Siva, end up falling in love with Anjali, a choreographer. However, the brothers have a rift when Siva becomes possessive of Anjali.

title: Duet
subTitle: Two musician brothers, Guna and Siva, end up falling in love with Anjali, a choreographer. However, the brothers have a rift when Siva becomes possessive of Anjali.

title: Gentleman
subTitle: Kicha is a modern-day Robin Hood, who along with his friend, Mani, steals from the rich to aid the poor. In society, he is a respected man who runs a small business.

title: Lovely
subTitle: Mahadevan does not believe in love and hates the word, but his daughter Nivedha loves Chandru. In order to get his consent, the couple comes up with an intricate plan and executes it.

subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
